headline: Anti-Trump Climate Protesters Storm NYC Apple Store, Confront CEO Tim Cook Amid Texas Flood Crisis
summary: Demonstrators gathered inside and outside of New York City's 5th Avenue Apple store on Sunday to denounce big tech companies for backtracking on their previous support of the Paris Climate Agreement and to protest the Trump administration.

headline: Ex-Trump Lawyer Sent This Message To Elon Musk After Feud With Donald Trump Erupted
summary: Elon Musk has received an unexpected offer of support from Michael Cohen, President Trump's former personal attorney.

headline: US Plans To Restrict AI Chip Exports to Malaysia, Thailand To Curb Diversion to China
summary: The US government is considering restrictions on the export of AI chips, including those produced by Nvidia, to Malaysia and Thailand.

headline: Kevin O'Leary Says 'You'll Never Be Free' If You Remain An Employee, But There's Actually Nothing Wrong With It: Here's Why
summary: Shark Tank investor Kevin O'Leary says only 1 in 3 people have the determination to succeed as an entrepreneur and taste true freedom. He also praises Steve Jobs and Elon Musk for their high signal-to-noise ratio and work ethic.

headline: Cuban's AI Prediction, IBM's Rise, Musk's New Hire And More: This Week In AI
summary: Top stories on AI, including Cuban predicting a trillionaire, IBM's success, Musk's xAI hire, and debates on AI's impact on employment.

headline: NIKE, Datadog And Snap Are Among Top 11 Large Cap Gainers Last Week (June 30-July 4): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
summary: 11 best performing large-cap stocks last week, including Symbotic, Nike, First Solar, Datadog, HPE, Summit Therapeutics, Carnival, POSCO, Wynn Resorts, SharkNinja, and Snap

headline: Consumer Tech News (June 30–July 4): Trump's Tax Bill Advances, S&P Hits Record, Nvidia Nears $4 Trillion, Apple Debuts iOS 26 Spam Filter
summary: Trump signs tax bill, markets rally to record highs, Nvidia nears $4 trillion, and Apple, Google, Tesla, and AI developments steal the spotlight.

summary: Apple Inc. has been making headlines with new features, stock boost from AI expectations, successful movie, rebounding iPhone sales.
